title: Rare 'ring of fire' eclipse seen by few | Space photo of the day for Feb. 26, 2026
description: A 'ring of fire' solar eclipse glowed over Antarctica, witnessed by only a handful of researchers at Concordia Research Station.
content: A 'ring of fire' solar eclipse glowed over Antarctica, witnessed by only a handful of researchers at Concordia Research Station.
